proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` have a higher mean `objective_response` rate than patients without `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`.

analyses.code: Two-sample difference in objective_response proportions by treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine.
analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 0.220 among patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` versus 0.166 without it, an absolute response-rate difference of +0.0535.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model: objective_response ~ AML covariates + treatments.
analyses.result_summary: In a multivariable linear probability model adjusted for demographics, AML genetics, disease burden labs, and all listed AML treatments, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` main-effect coefficient was +0.0542.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation` have a higher mean `objective_response` rate than patients without `npm1_mutation`.

analyses.code: Two-sample difference in objective_response proportions by npm1_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 0.235 with `npm1_mutation` versus 0.167 without it, an absolute difference of +0.0674.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates and treatment indicators.
analyses.result_summary: In the initial multivariable main-effects model, `npm1_mutation` remained positively associated with response with coefficient +0.0675.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `objective_response`, with each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` reducing response probability.
Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower `objective_response`, with each 5 percentage-point increase reducing response probability.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model; ecog_ps entered as an ordinal covariate.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability modeling showed each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` was associated with a -0.0522 lower response probability.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model; weight_loss_pct_6mo scaled per 5 percentage points.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted linear probability modeling showed each 5 percentage-point increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` was associated with a -0.0260 lower response probability.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher marrow disease burden, measured by `blast_pct_marrow`, is associated with lower `objective_response`, with each 10 percentage-point increase reducing response probability.
Higher leukemic burden, measured by `wbc_k_per_ul`, is associated with lower `objective_response`, with each 10 k/uL increase reducing response probability.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model; blast_pct_marrow scaled per 10 percentage points.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted modeling showed each 10 percentage-point increase in `blast_pct_marrow` was associated with a -0.0077 lower response probability.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model; wbc_k_per_ul scaled per 10 k/uL.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted modeling showed each 10 k/uL increase in `wbc_k_per_ul` was associated with a -0.0025 lower response probability.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `objective_response`, with each 1 g/dL increase raising response probability.
Higher inflammation, measured by `crp_mg_l`, is associated with lower `objective_response`, with each 10 mg/L increase reducing response probability.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model; albumin_g_dl scaled per 1 g/dL.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted modeling showed each 1 g/dL increase in `albumin_g_dl` was associated with a +0.0181 higher response probability.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model; crp_mg_l scaled per 10 mg/L.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted modeling showed each 10 mg/L increase in `crp_mg_l` was associated with a -0.0085 lower response probability.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `tp53_mutation` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `tp53_mutation`.
Patients with `complex_karyotype` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates and treatment indicators.
analyses.result_summary: In the initial adjusted main-effects model, `tp53_mutation` was associated with a -0.0263 lower response probability.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates and treatment indicators.
analyses.result_summary: In the initial adjusted main-effects model, `complex_karyotype` was associated with a -0.0239 lower response probability.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is stronger among patients with `unfit_for_intensive=1` than among patients with `unfit_for_intensive=0`.

analyses.code: Two-by-two response-rate difference-in-differences for treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine and unfit_for_intensive.
analyses.result_summary: A treatment-by-subgroup difference-in-differences analysis showed response rates of 0.308 for venetoclax/unfit versus 0.160 for venetoclax/fit, compared with 0.163 for no venetoclax/unfit versus 0.168 for no venetoclax/fit; the interaction effect was +0.1528.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine:unfit_for_intensive.
analyses.result_summary: In an adjusted interaction model, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` had a coefficient of +0.1523.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` with `objective_response` is stronger among patients with `npm1_mutation=1` than among patients with `npm1_mutation=0`.

analyses.code: Two-by-two response-rate difference-in-differences for treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine and npm1_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: A treatment-by-biomarker difference-in-differences analysis showed response rates of 0.347 for venetoclax/NPM1-mutated versus 0.165 for venetoclax/NPM1-wildtype, compared with 0.160 for no venetoclax/NPM1-mutated versus 0.169 for no venetoclax/NPM1-wildtype; the interaction effect was +0.1908.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The apparent two-way effects for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`, `npm1_mutation`, and `unfit_for_intensive` are driven by a three-way subgroup: patients with all three variables equal to 1 have much higher `objective_response` than expected from the two-way effects alone.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates, venetoclax/npm1/unfit two-way terms, and venetoclax:npm1:unfit.
analyses.result_summary: In a multivariable model containing main effects, all two-way products among `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`, `npm1_mutation`, and `unfit_for_intensive`, and their three-way product, the three-way interaction coefficient was +0.4633.

analyses.code: Two-sample difference in objective_response proportions comparing the three-way subgroup to all other patients.
analyses.result_summary: The observed response rate was 0.633 in the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1`, `npm1_mutation=1`, `unfit_for_intensive=1` subgroup versus 0.165 in all other patients, a difference of +0.4680.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After explicitly modeling the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` by `unfit_for_intensive` subgroup, the lower-order `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` interaction is small and positive, close to zero.

After explicitly modeling the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` by `unfit_for_intensive` subgroup, the lower-order `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` interaction is small and positive, close to zero.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model including all lower-order and three-way venetoclax/npm1/unfit terms.
analyses.result_summary: In the three-way model, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` coefficient was only +0.0071 and was not significant.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model including all lower-order and three-way venetoclax/npm1/unfit terms.
analyses.result_summary: In the three-way model, the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `unfit_for_intensive` coefficient was +0.0143 and was not significant at 0.05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1`, `npm1_mutation=1`, and `unfit_for_intensive=1`, `tp53_mutation=1` is associated with lower `objective_response` than `tp53_mutation=0`.

analyses.code: Two-sample difference in objective_response proportions within treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1, npm1_mutation=1, unfit_for_intensive=1.
analyses.result_summary: Within the venetoclax/NPM1-mutated/unfit subgroup, response was 0.188 with `tp53_mutation=1` versus 0.691 with `tp53_mutation=0`, a difference of -0.5024.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1`, `npm1_mutation=1`, and `unfit_for_intensive=1`, `complex_karyotype=1` is associated with lower `objective_response` than `complex_karyotype=0`.

analyses.code: Two-sample difference in objective_response proportions within treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1, npm1_mutation=1, unfit_for_intensive=1.
analyses.result_summary: Within the venetoclax/NPM1-mutated/unfit subgroup, response was 0.184 with `complex_karyotype=1` versus 0.717 with `complex_karyotype=0`, a difference of -0.5330.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1`, `npm1_mutation=1`, `unfit_for_intensive=1`, `tp53_mutation=0`, and `complex_karyotype=0` have much higher `objective_response` than all other patients.

analyses.code: Two-sample difference in objective_response proportions for venetoclax/NPM1-mutated/unfit/TP53-wildtype/non-complex-karyotype versus all other patients.
analyses.result_summary: The refined favorable subgroup had response 0.786 compared with 0.165 among all other patients, an absolute difference of +0.6208.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients treated with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`, `tp53_mutation=1` reduces `objective_response` relative to `tp53_mutation=0`, beyond main effects and the favorable three-way subgroup.

Among patients treated with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`, `complex_karyotype=1` reduces `objective_response` relative to `complex_karyotype=0`, beyond main effects and the favorable three-way subgroup.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates, favorable three-way term, and venetoclax:tp53 interaction.
analyses.result_summary: In the interaction model containing the favorable three-way term, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `tp53_mutation` was -0.0743.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates, favorable three-way term, and venetoclax:complex_karyotype interaction.
analyses.result_summary: In the interaction model containing the favorable three-way term, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `complex_karyotype` was -0.0530.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_7plus3` and `objective_response` is worse among patients with `complex_karyotype=1` than among those with `complex_karyotype=0`.

analyses.code: Two-by-two response-rate difference-in-differences for treatment_7plus3 and complex_karyotype.
analyses.result_summary: A treatment-by-karyotype difference-in-differences analysis showed response 0.155 for 7+3/complex versus 0.195 for 7+3/non-complex, compared with 0.179 for no 7+3/complex versus 0.188 for no 7+3/non-complex; the interaction effect was -0.0304.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_7plus3:complex_karyotype.
analyses.result_summary: In an adjusted interaction model, `treatment_7plus3` by `complex_karyotype` was -0.0305.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `treatment_7plus3` by `unfit_for_intensive` interaction on `objective_response` is close to zero with a slightly negative direction.
The `treatment_7plus3` by age >=70 years interaction on `objective_response` is close to zero with a slightly negative direction.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_7plus3:unfit_for_intensive.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `treatment_7plus3` by `unfit_for_intensive` interaction was -0.0020 and was not significant.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_7plus3:age70.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `treatment_7plus3` by age >=70 interaction was -0.0012 and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_midostaurin` and `objective_response` is stronger among `flt3_itd=1` patients than among `flt3_itd=0` patients.
The association between `treatment_gilteritinib` and `objective_response` is stronger among `flt3_itd=1` patients than among `flt3_itd=0` patients.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_midostaurin:flt3_itd.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `treatment_midostaurin` by `flt3_itd` interaction was -0.0156 and was not significant.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_gilteritinib:flt3_itd.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `treatment_gilteritinib` by `flt3_itd` interaction was +0.0107 and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_midostaurin` and `objective_response` is stronger among `flt3_tkd=1` patients than among `flt3_tkd=0` patients.
The association between `treatment_gilteritinib` and `objective_response` is stronger among `flt3_tkd=1` patients than among `flt3_tkd=0` patients.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_midostaurin:flt3_tkd.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `treatment_midostaurin` by `flt3_tkd` interaction was -0.0110 and was not significant.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_gilteritinib:flt3_tkd.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `treatment_gilteritinib` by `flt3_tkd` interaction was -0.0291 and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_ivosidenib` and `objective_response` is stronger among `idh1_mutation=1` patients than among `idh1_mutation=0` patients.
The association between `treatment_enasidenib` and `objective_response` is stronger among `idh2_mutation=1` patients than among `idh2_mutation=0` patients.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_ivosidenib:idh1_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `treatment_ivosidenib` by `idh1_mutation` interaction was -0.0439, opposite the hypothesized positive direction, and narrowly missed conventional significance.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates plus treatment_enasidenib:idh2_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `treatment_enasidenib` by `idh2_mutation` interaction was +0.0039 and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The initially observed positive main effect of `npm1_mutation` becomes negative after modeling the favorable `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` by `npm1_mutation` by `unfit_for_intensive` interaction.

The initially observed negative main effects of `tp53_mutation` and `complex_karyotype` become small and positive after modeling their treatment-specific interactions with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates, favorable three-way term, and adverse venetoclax interactions.
analyses.result_summary: In the refined interaction model, the `npm1_mutation` main-effect coefficient became -0.0127; despite nominal significance, this was opposite the original positive main-effect direction.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates, favorable three-way term, and adverse venetoclax interactions.
analyses.result_summary: In the refined interaction model, the `tp53_mutation` main effect was +0.0020 and not significant.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with AML covariates, favorable three-way term, and adverse venetoclax interactions.
analyses.result_summary: In the refined interaction model, the `complex_karyotype` main effect was +0.0105 and not significant.
